{{Quote|Scanners show a refugee camp to the east of the base. Your Empire wishes you to eliminate it as a show of strength to our enemy.|[[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]] to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Force Commander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref>}}
This '''refugee camp''' on [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] was destroyed in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Abridon Nationalists]] [[Uprising on Abridon|revolted]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], briefly delivering [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]] into the hands of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. A major Rebel base was set up in a rural area to the southwest of the [[Abridon capital city|capital]], near a refugee camp.

However, Imperial forces arrived and [[Massacre on Abridon|quelled]] the rebellion within days. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Brenn Tantor]], commanding the Imperial ground forces, finished off the base near the camp last.

His superior, [[Grand General/Legends|Grand General]] [[Malcor Brashin]], desired to completely crush Abridon resistance, and ordered Tantor to destroy the nearby refugee camp to display Imperial strength and the consequences of allowing the Rebels to operate nearby. Tantor refused the order.

Furious, Brashin locked him out of communication frequencies and ordered Tantor's [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to raze the camp, telling them that Tantor had been injured by enemy fire and they needed to avenge him by razing the camp, ostensibly occupied by Rebel sympathizers.

The incident prompted Rebel general [[Tyr Taskeen]] to offer Tantor the chance to defect, which he later took, defecting on [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]] and later returning to [[Liberation of Abridon|capture]] Abridon for the Rebellion.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
